ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., member, moderator, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's contact phone number */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Unique code for user referrals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum */,
  "forum_name" TEXT /* Name of the forum category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the forum is about */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the forum */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the forum is private */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* Status of the forum's moderation */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules and guidelines for the forum */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image or banner for the forum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum where the post is made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the post was last updated */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "is_sticky" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the post is sticky (pinned to the top) */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the post has been deleted */,
  "deleted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deleted the post */,
  "deleted_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the post deletion */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the post is locked (no new comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post to which this comment belongs */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the comment has been deleted */,
  "deleted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deleted the comment */,
  "deleted_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the comment deletion */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the comment is hidden */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., member, moderator, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the role is the default role for new users */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the notification has been archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that was moderated (if applicable) */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment that was moderated (if applicable) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., 'deleted', 'edited') */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the moderation action was automated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being reported (if applicable) */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being reported (if applicable) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the report */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for reporting */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who resolved the report */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post associated with the tag */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this profile belongs to */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* User's personal website or blog */,
  "pet_names" TEXT /* JSON array of pet names */,
  "pet_types" TEXT /* JSON array of pet types */,
  "favorite_tags" TEXT /* JSON array of favorite tags */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the profile is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the message */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the message has been read */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the message has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum subscribed to */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post subscribed to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the subscription is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id")
)
